scripts.build: cross-env PRISMA_GENERATE_SKIP_AUTOINSTALL=true pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma && tsc
scripts.db:generate: cross-env PRISMA_GENERATE_SKIP_AUTOINSTALL=true pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: cross-env PRISMA_GENERATE_SKIP_AUTOINSTALL=true pnpm exec prisma db push --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
